# Services Catalog (auto-generated)

Per-service summary derived from the YAML contracts in [`contracts/services/`](../../contracts/services/). Each row points back to its source file — edit there and re-run `bash bin/ops/generate-reference-docs.sh` to refresh this page.

> This page is regenerated by the script on every CI run. The contents below are seeded from the contracts at the time of the Phase 15 commit; the live `mkdocs` build re-runs the generator so the published site always matches `contracts/services/*.yaml`.

For the curated, hand-authored catalog (with deeper per-service operational notes) see [`service-catalog.md`](service-catalog.md). This page exists alongside it as the auto-generated rollup that can never drift from the YAML.
